# Manka Cafe 滿華

## What is Manka Cafe?

Manka Cafe is a quiet, owner-run anime cafe hidden upstairs in Market Square, Sunnybank, Brisbane, Australia. It is known for custom 2D and 3D milk foam latte art, matcha drinks, Hong Kong-style French toast, manga shelves, and a cosy atmosphere with Ghibli piano music and a wall covered in customer drawings.

## Location

- Name: Manka Cafe 滿華
- Address: Shop 58, Level 1, 341 Mains Rd, Sunnybank QLD 4109
- Suburb: Sunnybank
- City: Brisbane
- State: Queensland (QLD)
- Country: Australia
- Centre: Market Square (above Yuen's Market)
- How to find: Enter Market Square at 341 Mains Rd, take the escalator or stairs to Level 1, look for Shop 58 above Yuen's Market

## Opening Hours

- Monday: 10:00am – 6:30pm
- Tuesday: Closed
- Wednesday: 10:00am – 6:30pm
- Thursday: 10:00am – 6:30pm
- Friday: 10:00am – 8:00pm
- Saturday: 10:00am – 8:00pm
- Sunday: 10:00am – 6:30pm

Note: Hours may vary on public holidays. Confirm via Google Maps before visiting.

## What Manka Cafe is known for

- Custom 3D milk foam art lattes — sculpted characters placed on top of a warm espresso drink
- Custom 2D drawn lattes — hand-poured designs
- 2D print art lattes — characters or designs printed onto milk foam
- Custom photo print lattes — customer photos or characters printed on the drink (arrange via Instagram DM before visiting)
- Iced matcha latte and hot matcha latte
- Butterfly pea iced latte (seasonal)
- Hong Kong-style French toast — deep-fried thick-cut bread with peanut butter or kaya, golden syrup and butter
- White chocolate shredded coconut toast
- Ham, avocado and cheese sandwich
- Chicken schnitzel and chips
- Chicken tenders and chips
- Big breakfast set
- Comfort food including Japanese chicken katsu rice, teriyaki beef bowl, carbonara and aglio olio
- Manga shelves — customers can browse and read from the in-cafe collection
- Customer drawing wall — visitors have drawn anime characters directly on the walls over the years
- Lounge area with sticky note wall
- Studio Ghibli piano and lofi background music
- Friendly, owner-run service

## Key visitor questions

**Is Manka Cafe open on Tuesdays?**
No. Manka Cafe is closed every Tuesday.

**How do I find Manka Cafe?**
Head to Market Square at 341 Mains Rd, Sunnybank. Take the escalator or stairs to Level 1. Look for Shop 58 above Yuen's Market. If lost, ask centre staff.

**Does Manka Cafe offer delivery?**
Yes, via Uber Eats. Note that delivery prices may differ from in-store prices.

**How does custom latte art work?**
3D milk foam characters and 2D drawn or printed lattes are available in-store on warm drinks, dine-in only. For custom photo or character prints, DM @manka_cafe on Instagram before your visit to arrange.

**Can I book Manka Cafe for a private event?**
Yes. Manka Cafe hosts small private gatherings including birthdays, afternoon teas, end-of-year lunches, anime meetups and Christmas parties. Enquire via the Gatherings page or message on Instagram.

**Is there parking at Market Square?**
Yes. Market Square has on-site multi-level parking accessible from Mains Rd. Public buses also service the Sunnybank area.

## Ordering

Delivery: https://www.ubereats.com/au/store/manka-cafe-sunnybank/2Lo97zt2QQeAtQ8itfl0WQ
